qry:select.name: qry_columnas
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT LIQ09_VARIABLES.c_variable , LIQ09_VARIABLES.n_valor , LIQ09_VARIABLES.o_variable FROM LIQ14_CONC_VAR , LIQ09_VARIABLES JOIN LIQ09_VARIABLES.oi_variable INNER LIQ14_CONC_VAR.oi_variable WHERE LIQ14_CONC_VAR.oi_concepto = {#FILTRO:@oi_concepto} ORDER BY n_valor ASC ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: QRY_EMPRESA
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT O03.c_empresa , O03.d_empresa , L19.c_liquidacion , L19.d_titulo , L19.e_periodo , L99.oi_liquidacion_ddo FROM LIQ19_LIQUIDACION AS L19 , ORG03_EMPRESAS AS O03 , LIQ19_EJECUCIONES AS E19 , LIQ99_LIQUIDACION AS L99 JOIN L19.oi_liquidacion INNER E19.oi_liquidacion , L19.oi_empresa INNER O03.oi_empresa , E19.oi_liquidacion_ddo INNER L99.oi_liquidacion_ddo WHERE L19.oi_liquidacion = {#FILTRO:@oi_liquidacion} AND L99.c_estado = \'F\' ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qry_personas
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT L97.e_numero_legajo , L97.d_ape_y_nom , L20.oi_tot_liq_per FROM LIQ99_RECIBOS AS L99 , LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER AS L20 , LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP AS L97 JOIN L99.oi_tot_liq_per INNER L20.oi_tot_liq_per , L20.oi_per_emp_ddo INNER L97.oi_per_emp_ddo WHERE L99.oi_liquidacion_ddo = {#PARAM:@oi_liquidacion_ddo} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qry_variables
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql(' SELECT O.oi_cab_conc_ddo , V.c_variable , G.d_variable , V.n_valor_s
FROM LIQ20_VAR_LIQ_CONC AS V , LIQ20_CONC_LIQ_PER AS C , LIQ96_CONCEPTOS AS O , LIQ09_VARIABLES AS G
JOIN V.oi_conc_liq_per INNER C.oi_conc_liq_per , C.oi_concepto_ddo INNER O.oi_concepto_ddo , V.c_variable INNER G.c_variable WHERE O.c_concepto = {#CODIGOCON:@c_concepto} AND C.oi_tot_liq_per = {#PARAM:@oi_tot_liq_per} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qry_concepto
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT l.oi_concepto , l.c_concepto , l.d_concepto FROM LIQ14_CONCEPTOS as l WHERE l.oi_concepto = {#PARAM:@oi_concepto} ')/ROWS/ROW
